error.channelNotEnabled: This channel is not enabled. Please go to the control panel to enable it.
error.unknownCommand:
Unknown command: `/{command}`

Please use `@Vibe Remote /start` to access all bot features.
error.settingsFailed: Failed to open settings. Please try again.
error.cwdChangeFailed: Failed to open directory change dialog. Please try again.
error.resumeFailed: Failed to open resume dialog. Please try again.
error.cwdNotDirectory: Path exists but is not a directory: `{path}`
error.routingModalFailed: Failed to open agent settings. Please try again.
error.languageUpdateFailed: Language update failed. Please try again.
error.updateUnavailable: Update action is not available right now.
error.agentNotConfigured: Agent `{agent}` is not configured. Make sure the Codex CLI is installed and environment variables are set if this channel is routed to Codex.
error.opencodeQuestionUnsupportedWechat: OpenCode interactive questions are temporarily disabled on WeChat. Please send a follow-up message instead.
error.sessionReset: Session error detected. Session has been reset. Please try your message again.
error.sessionConnectionLost: Connection to Claude was lost. Please try your message again.

success.sessionResumedTip1: 💬 *Click this message and reply in the thread sidebar* to continue with this session.
success.sessionResumedTip2: _(Sending a new message in the channel will start a fresh session.)_

settings.personalizationDesc: Configure how {agent} messages appear in your Slack workspace.
settings.visibilityDesc: Select which message types to hide from {agent} output:

discord.settingsSubtitle: Adjust message visibility, mention behavior, and language.
discord.routingSubtitle: Select backend and model settings for this channel.

info.messageTypesFooter: Hidden messages won't be sent to your IM platform.
info.howItWorksRealtimeDesc: Prefix your message with `AgentName:` to route to a specific agent, e.g. `Plan: design a caching layer`
info.howItWorksPersistentDesc: Send a new message while the agent is running — it will stop and start your new task. Or type `stop` to cancel.
info.howItWorksCommandsDesc: Each thread is an isolated session. Open multiple threads to run parallel tasks.
info.howItWorksWorkDirDesc: Attach images or files to your message — the agent can read them directly.
info.howItWorksSettingsDesc: Mention @bot to switch agents, models, reasoning effort, or hide verbose message types.
info.howItWorksFooter: Just type to chat with {agent}. No special commands needed!

settings.title: Settings
settings.requireMentionHint: When enabled, the bot only responds when @mentioned in channels (DMs always work).
settings.messageVisibilityDesc: Choose which message types to *show* from agent output. Unselected types won't appear in your Slack workspace.
settings.tip: You can show/hide message types at any time. Changes apply immediately to new messages.
settings.requireMentionLarkNote: Note: To receive non-mention messages in groups, the Feishu app needs the `im:message.group_msg` permission.
settings.languageHint: Changes the language for bot messages in Slack and the Web UI.

cwd.title: Change Working Directory
cwd.hint: Use absolute path (e.g., /home/user/project) or ~ for home directory
cwd.tip: The directory will be created if it doesn't exist.

resume.title: Resume Session
resume.description: Select a saved session or paste a session ID to resume work in this thread.
resume.showingFirst100: Showing the first 100 saved sessions. Paste a session ID below for others.
resume.noSessionsFound: No stored sessions found. Paste a session ID below to resume.

routing.title: Agent Settings
routing.tip: Select (Default) to use the backend's configured defaults.

start.quickActionsDesc: Use the buttons below to manage your {agent} sessions, or simply type any message to start chatting with {agent}!

new.started: Started a fresh session. Your next message will begin a new conversation.

clear.noSessions:
No active sessions to clear.
Session state has been reset.

cwd.hint: This is where Agent will execute commands
cwd.changeInstructions:
To change working directory, use:
`/setcwd <path>`

Example:
`/setcwd ~/projects/myapp`
cwd.clickButton: Click the 'Change Work Dir' button in the /start menu to change working directory.

resume.slackOnly: Resume is currently available only on Slack. Continue in the same thread to auto-resume.
resume.clickButton: Please click the Resume button inside Slack to open the picker.
resume.noStoredSessions: No stored sessions found. You can still paste a session ID manually in the resume modal.

stop.noActiveSession: No active session to stop for this channel.

routing.slackOnly: 🤖 Agent switching is currently only available in Slack. Use Slack Agent Settings to configure routing.
routing.introDesc: Configure which backend to use for this channel.

bind.success: ✅ Bind successful! Welcome, {name}. You can now use Vibe Remote via DM.
bind.successAdmin: ✅ Bind successful! Welcome, {name}. You are the first user and have been granted admin privileges.
bind.alreadyBound: You are already bound. No action needed.
bind.invalidCode: ❌ Invalid or expired bind code. Please check and try again.
bind.usage:
Usage: `bind <code>`

`/bind <code>` also works. Please enter the bind code provided by an admin.
bind.dmOnly: The bind command can only be used in a direct message. Please DM the bot with `bind <code>`.
bind.dmNotBound:
🔒 You haven't bound your account yet.
Use `bind <code>` to get started. (`/bind <code>` is also supported.)

permission.adminOnly: 🔒 Only admins can change bot settings. Contact an admin if you need access.
